agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Introducing aromatic residues at position 5 and hydrophobic substitutions at pos

report.hypothesis: Introducing aromatic residues at position 5 and hydrophobic substitutions at position 11 will enhance SSTR2-specific interactions with ECL2/TM5, while avoiding off-target SSTR3/5 binding. This will increase the selectivity margin by improving SSTR2 affinity and reducing off-target complementarity.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current designs are achieving strong ddG values but are not sufficiently opt

report.hypothesis: The current designs are achieving strong ddG values but are not sufficiently optimized for SSTR2 selectivity. The focus must shift to fine-tuning non-pharmacophore positions to reduce off-target interactions, particularly with SSTR3 and SSTR5.

proposed_changes.rationale: To improve SSTR2 selectivity, we must disrupt conserved pocket contacts at non-pharmacophore positions (1, 2, 5, 6, 11, 12) that contribute to off-target binding (SSTR3/SSTR5).
These mutations aim to disrupt conserved interactions with off-target SSTRs while maintaining flexibility and compatibility with the SSTR2 binding pocket.
